intentSynonyms: move a file in google drive
move a file to a different folder in gdrive
description: Move a file or folder to a different parent folder. Specify the current parent to remove and the new parent to add. Use "root" for My Drive root.

file_id.description: File or folder ID to move

from_parent_id.description: Current parent folder ID to remove. Use "root" for My Drive root.

to_parent_id.description: New parent folder ID. Use "root" for My Drive root.
